facebook.caption: POV: you're walking Đường Trần Hưng Đạo and duck into Blue Monkey Bar on a whim. 4.6 stars. 536 reviews. Now you understand why. $15-30 a head gets you solid drinks and a crowd that's actually having fun. Not a resort bar. Not a tourist trap. Just a good night out on Phu Quoc. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
